evals.name: greenfield-bootstrap
evals.prompt: Bootstrap this repo so a Claude agent can navigate it — generate a design doc and a knowledge graph, then commit it.
evals.expected_output: Phase 1-5 run end to end: .understand-anything/{config,knowledge-graph,meta,fingerprints}.json created with autoUpdate:true; AGENT_DESIGN_DOC.md (and .agent-docs/*.md if >200 lines) written with file:line citations; CLAUDE.md wired with @AGENT_DESIGN_DOC.md + Karpathy block (after diff approval); single local commit containing only the allowlisted files, no Co-Authored-By trailer.

evals.name: architecture-no-commit
evals.prompt: Make this codebase agent-ready and include architecture diagrams. Don't auto-commit, I want to review first.
evals.expected_output: Phases 1-4 + 2.5 run; Phase 5 skipped. ARCHITECTURE.md exists with 4-6 Mermaid blocks, each validated by mmdc (or carrying %% VALIDATION WARNING). .understand-anything/config.json has both autoUpdate:true and architecture:true. No git commit happens.

evals.name: refresh-architecture-only
evals.prompt: Refresh the AGENT_DESIGN_DOC and architecture for this project — the KG is already current.
evals.expected_output: Phase 1 skipped (--skip-understand). Phase 2 re-reads the existing KG + source, regenerates design doc preserving [NEEDS_CONTEXT] markers where possible. Phase 2.5 regenerates ARCHITECTURE.md. Phase 5 produces a commit with only the regenerated files.
